markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.0322 — Alternative Identification Number Inspection

The department by rule may establish a process for verifying the identity of an item listed in Section 501.0321 (Identification Number Inspection) (a) as an alternative to an identification number inspection under Section 501.0321 (Identification Number Inspection) . The rules may include the persons authorized to perform the inspection, when an alternative inspection under this section is required, and any fees that may be assessed. Any fee authorized must comply with Sections 501.0321 (Identification Number Inspection) (e) and (f).

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B.2076), Sec. 10, eff. September 1, 2017.*
